Implementation branch: codex/0f8e-claude-ship-release-skill

Copied .agents/skills/ship-release/SKILL.md into .claude/skills/ship-release/SKILL.md so Claude agents receive the hardened release procedure. Verified the two files are byte-identical with diff.
